## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to review Ramp's content performance and discuss ongoing content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance stable/improving: Block pages at higher level, Fordium pages spiked, expense category pages stable, tuning pages seeing higher clicks](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Vendor pages without internal data: Drafts generated, pending review with Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Content refreshes: Procurement blogs performing well, others lagging; Matt to review backlog with new support](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Future focus: Expanding into non-software categories for vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Block pages: Stabilized at higher performance level post-spike](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Fordium pages: Unexpected jump in performance](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Top performing state pages: Texas, Washington, New York, South Carolina](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Slight position gain, overall stable](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Tuning pages (1st batch): Consistently higher click levels over past months](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Tuning pages (2nd batch): Small jump due to quarterly taxes and budget variance blocks](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Liquidity position report driving session increases](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Steady at 215-225 sessions/week](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Versus pages: Increased sessions; alternatives and overview pages slightly declined](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Other clusters (project management, AI, etc.): Minor drops, but holding top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### Content Refreshes

  - [4 blogs in progress, procurement blogs performing well](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Other refreshed content lagging in performance](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Matt working on procurement contract for review support](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Backlog of refreshes pending Matt's review](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Discussion on updating initial content refresh list (pulled \~May) for relevance](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Vendor Pages Initiative

  - [Drafts created for pages without internal data (4-5 for initial review)](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Image/icon creation causing minor delays](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Review-ready drafts expected tomorrow, to be added to Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Victoria to review upon return](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Future Content Expansion

  - [Front-end resources secured for new features](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Plans to expand into non-software categories](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [May require different information gathering approach](https://fathom.video/share/-MpvPhUbPCWnyw1eHNsjPNjCasJWfbA6?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
